misc: Always a gentleman despite occasionally losing his temper on the course
biography: Daniel, representing Oulujokilaakson Golfklubi ry, has cultivated a distinctive persona within the Hector Trophée, often lauded for his gentlemanly conduct, even when the competitive pressures occasionally lead to a momentary flicker of temper on the greens. His history with this esteemed pair competition is substantial, having graced its fairways for seven previous editions.

Across his impressive seven prior entries, Daniel has demonstrated an exceptional aptitude for team play, culminating in the triumphant hoisting of the coveted Hector Trophée on two separate occasions. These victories underscore his capacity for strategic partnership and performance under duress. While the individual Victor Trophy has yet to be added to his esteemed collection, his contributions to the pair format are undeniably significant. Although he will not be among the competitors for the forthcoming Hector Trophée 2026, his legacy of success remains firmly imprinted.

Even with his absence from the 2026 field, Daniel remains an active and valued member of the broader Hector events community. His blend of competitive intensity, marked by those fleeting moments of frustration, coupled with his enduring sportsmanship and proven team success, establishes him as a memorable and respected figure whose return to the Hector Trophée fairways would undoubtedly be met with keen anticipation.
